name: @chart-review/pipeline-extract-ner
description: Direct-LLM NER extractor for NER (named-entity recognition) tasks. One LLM call per note identifies candidate spans (identification pass), then a per-span call maps each to an ontology concept (normalization pass); spans are written to review_state.json via the mcp-core-ner disk-write helpers. The MVP runs this batch path (no NER MCP server). Transport is provider-pluggable via llm-call.ts (OpenRouter chat-completions or Azure Responses).
